appliedUpdates.description: Recorded desktop-shell concurrency limits plus native-shell and Flutter widget flow-validator guidance for the current bridge/open-on-Mac/settings validation surfaces.

notes: Spawned two serialized flow validators for native shell/runtime checks and Flutter mobile desktop-affordance checks because desktop-shell validation shares bridge trust state and the current host load favored a combined concurrency ceiling of 1.

Live setup on 2026-03-18 used codex app-server on ws://127.0.0.1:4222, bridge health on http://127.0.0.1:3110/health, and an existing Tailscale Serve mapping from https://macbook-pro.taild54ede.ts.net to http://127.0.0.1:3110.
Desktop-shell user-surface validation used targeted xcodebuild, flutter test, cargo test, curl, open, plutil, and pgrep commands with evidence captured under the mission evidence directory.
